Attorney Stephen M. Losh of Losh & Khoshlesan LLP (310-299-2283), via CourtCall for plaintiff;

Notice Of Motion To Add Additional Name Of Original Defendant To The Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES' Motion To Add Additional Name Of Original Defendant To The Judgment is continued to February 23, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Andres Sanchez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Japan Center West Associates, LP.
Sharon Chiu sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Wen Wen Lin.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $93,868.98
Pre-Judgment Interest at the rate of 10%: $10,978.17
Attorney's Fees: $2,019.50
Costs: $690.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $107,556.65
Judgment signed in open court.
